sources.hardware_engine_relevance: Defines the Gemma 4 family, native context windows, tool use, and supported deployment shapes; local engine compatibility was verified separately on vLLM 0.25.1.
sources.decision_impact: Set the E2B/E4B 128K and 12B/26B/31B 256K context targets and required tool/template coverage.

sources.hardware_engine_relevance: Primary engine guidance for Gemma 4; the local matrix pinned vLLM 0.25.1 and exercised the gemma4 reasoning and tool parsers on Blackwell GPUs.
sources.decision_impact: Established the upstream-compatible serve shape and justified testing the tokenizer-provided template instead of the repository's legacy template override.
Fast/Heavy low-latency candidate; rejected for strict intelligence quality.
Direct Fast control replacement candidate; rejected because it did not match the control's strict quality result.

sources.hardware_engine_relevance: Revision 5d8bb23cdbff01e89d2a1a47f3b3d29b877bca76; paired tokenizer revision 12ace6d648d72bd41519e140f1185f34d38c7e3d; validated on RTX 5090 and RTX PRO 6000.
sources.decision_impact: Promoted to Heavy after repeated quality, 240K context, 20-tool, and live router identity gates.

sources.hardware_engine_relevance: BF16 revision 01e5b3ee840d3a9e0b0b493c593e85398a30ef75; no official W4A16 checkpoint was available in the tested set.
sources.decision_impact: Fast startup failed on 32 GB; Heavy was fast but rejected by the strict intelligence gate.

sources.hardware_engine_relevance: Revision a766e9afa44931dfa9ff5de90af9494ca193e74c; paired tokenizer revision b9ea41a2887d8607f594846523f94c6cc75ac8a4.
sources.decision_impact: Passed Heavy quality but was much slower; Fast usable context topped out below 128K.
